{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322063010F489FA7ECD50D97E65E0"}"},"total":6797},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"6990567900163916574","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书非常的好，战力没有崩塌，主角都不是毁天灭地的 这样的树非常好看，我是个小学生没有。多好的词来形容这本书。就是非常好看！后期就不得行了。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1627618427,"group_id":"6911244975103544327","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"我想写小说，非常的想写。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3oQjVQyHPv3zq/uBiTVo3GlFiQ3oFqlniTfT73Yv5ub","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/b52be1ea11b548b88f3fd3223254c7d7~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776707881&x-signature=FL7hv91ByRYCRQsQUME8PwToYIU%3D","user_id":"1895163659825835","user_name":"作者27mdpp"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1895163659825835","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6911244975103544327","book_info":{"abstract":"穿越到海贼王世界之后，觉醒了打工人系统，雷纳表示我天天都想加班。
克罗斯：做为海贼，雷纳才是最兢兢业业的那个啊！我不如他……
战国：自从消灭了克罗斯之后，克罗斯海贼团上出来的海贼，一个个都成了让海军头疼的大海贼。
做为海军战力天花板的卡普：当初真是后悔，在解决洛克斯的时候，没有连那个家伙一起干掉！
克罗斯海贼团解体，众人分道扬镳。
夏洛特·玲玲：ma~mama~雷纳，来我的船上吧！
凯多：还是跟我走吧！我带你称霸大海！
白胡子：我只想拥有家人，雷纳，来我的船上，我们就是一家人！
金狮子史基：雷纳！不要被他们诱惑了，白胡子虽然实力强劲，但是他没有野心，玲玲和凯多虽然有野心，但他们就是两个疯子，所以来我这里吧！我们一起征服世界！
雷纳看了看倒在神之谷的克罗斯船长，做为上一个想要称霸世界的强者，他的下场自己可是亲眼目睹了，于是雷纳轻叹一声，说道：“我只是想加个班而已，不用这样吧！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-images/4dd3324843c40275899d976ea72125ad","author":"会跑的橙子","author_id":"","book_id":"6911244975103544327","book_name":"海贼：我在洛克斯船上996","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#381810","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":370,"name":"海贼","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=370&name=海贼&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":850,"name":"无脑爽","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=850&name=无脑爽&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":731,"name":"封神","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=731&name=封神&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"6911679302983975431","read_count":"10914","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"3507203"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.9","serial_count":"1380","tags":"动漫衍生,系统,穿越,二次元,海贼,同人,无脑爽,魂穿,封神,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sig
